label: Cybercrime
description: Online fraud, hacking, phishing, and digital financial crimes
steps: Disconnect from the internet if your device is compromised
Call the National Cyber Crime Helpline at 1930 immediately
Block compromised cards and bank accounts through your bank
Change passwords for all affected accounts
File a complaint at cybercrime.gov.in with evidence screenshots
guidance: Never share OTPs or passwords with anyone claiming to be from your bank
Document all fraudulent transactions with timestamps
Report UPI fraud to your payment app and bank within 24 hours
Enable two-factor authentication on all financial accounts
Preserve chat logs, emails, and transaction IDs as evidence

helplines.name: National Cyber Crime Helpline
helplines.description: Report cyber fraud and financial scams
